title: CommandBlocker
description: Block unwanted commands with customizable permission settings.
body:
[![AshCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75887d69106ed9eb2dd595176121f279523f184_0.webp)](https://www.ashcraft.cz/)

The CommandBlocker plugin is designed to enhance server security and control by allowing administrators to block specific commands for players. This ensures that certain commands cannot be executed unless the player has the appropriate permission to bypass the restrictions. [Here’s how it works.](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/resource-detail/12)

Check out AshSource for more plugins and resources [ashsource.ashkiano.com](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/)
